current.headline: USA host Bosnia with pressure for a fast knockout start
current.summary: The United States face Bosnia and Herzegovina in Santa Clara with home support, Pulisic back in focus, and the market question centered on whether the US can strike inside the opening 20 minutes.

items.headline: U.S. faces Bosnia in first World Cup knockout round
items.summary: The USMNT meet Bosnia and Herzegovina in Santa Clara, with Pochettino's side favored but still facing questions against European opposition.

items.headline: USA World Cup 2026 team guide: pressure on Pochettino's co-hosts
items.summary: The United States entered the tournament with pressure to justify expectations, making attacking starts and Pulisic's role central to the knockout narrative.

items.headline: Bosnia and Herzegovina World Cup 2026 team guide
items.summary: Sergej Barbarez has made Bosnia intense and organized, a profile that could frustrate the United States if the hosts do not start quickly.
